candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of Sales'. In the visible periods, 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues' plus 'Cost of Sales - Balancing value' equals the selected 'Cost of Sales' total, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of Sales. The explicit COGS D&A row is embedded within that total, so no separate add-back row should be chosen.
No explicit SG&A-related depreciation/amortisation row is shown above operating profit in the provided excerpt. The only visible D&A row belongs to cost of revenues and is not relevant to XSGA.
